rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims but not all, and does not mark confidence or missing evidence explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the results are mixed in with the setup).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors by making unsupported causal claims and omitting details a reader needs to evaluate the experiments.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are traced.
